data.title: Incus Capital raises €800 million for European Credit Fund V, securing 50% of target in first close.
data.description: A Madrid-based real assets private credit specialist, Incus Capital (Incus), has declared the initial closing of its European Credit Fund V (Fund V) on October 2, 2025. The initial closing has successfully secured 50% of the fund's target size in closed and committed capital. Fund V is aiming for a total of €800 million in funds.

data.title: Zip Aviation achieves record-breaking helicopter operation at 2025 Ryder Cup, setting new event airlift logistics benchmark.
data.description: In a groundbreaking achievement at the 2025 Ryder Cup held in Bethpage, New York, Zip Aviation broke records with their helicopter operation. This endeavor established a new standard for event airlift logistics, as the company executed an unparalleled operation at Bethpage Black. Throughout the championship, Zip Aviation managed to conduct a remarkable number of flights, showcasing their expertise and efficiency in handling the event's transportation needs.

data.title: Pearle Vision introduces new store design merging clinical expertise with modern tech for personalized care.
data.description: A prominent eye care franchise integrating clinical knowledge with modern aesthetics and advanced technology for customized care, Pearle Vision unveiled its latest store design in New York on October 2, 2025. This new design aims to offer elevated personalized services to customers.

data.title: HKUST study finds TREM2 H157Y genetic variant increases Alzheimer's risk in ethnic Chinese.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 2, 2025, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST) released findings from a significant study showing that a genetic variant, TREM2 H157Y, markedly raises the likelihood of developing Alzheimer's disease (AD) in individuals of ethnic Chinese background. The study suggests that individuals carrying this genetic variant have a much higher risk of developing AD.

data.title: Investors of Quanex Building Products urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses between Dec 12, 2024 and Sep 5, 2025.
data.description: If you experienced financial losses in Quanex between December 12, 2024, and September 5, 2025, Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP urges investors to get in touch with him directly to explore their potential legal options.
